title: anastrepho #0390
definition:
1) to turn upside down, overturn
 2) to turn back
 3) to turn hither and thither, to turn one's self about, sojourn
    dwell in a place
 4) metaph. to conduct one's self, behave one's self, live
nasbUsage:
